_comment: HyperWebster additions manifest — Settings → Additions. kind: install (check+install) or toggle (check+enable+disable). category groups sections. Sources: official pacman / upstream installers only — no AUR, no Flatpak.

items.name: Frosted glass blur
items.desc: Raycast-style frosted shell panels and launcher

items.name: Rounded corners
items.desc: Caelestia-style rounding on shell and windows

items.name: Zephyr motion polish
items.desc: Overshoot flair on shell animations (off by default)

items.name: Hypersmooth 120/144 Hz
items.desc: VFR + snappier shell animation durations

items.name: Raycast-like launcher
items.desc: Fuzzy keyboard-first Super+Space launcher

items.name: DeckShift Gaming Mode
items.desc: Steam Big Picture gamescope session (Super+Shift+S)
items.install: set -e; [ -d "$HOME/deckshift/.git" ] || git clone https://git.no-signal.uk/hyperwebster/deckshift.git "$HOME/deckshift"; cd "$HOME/deckshift"; chmod +x deckshift.sh; ./deckshift.sh; sh "$HOME/.local/share/hyperwebster/deckshift-login/install-deckshift-login.sh"

items.name: Deckify / Chimera Gaming
items.desc: ChimeraOS gamescope session — Starman boot path (Super+Shift+S)

items.name: 4K HDR TV profile
items.desc: TV gaming hyprmoncfg profile + HDR/VRR hints

items.name: Steam
items.desc: Valve gaming platform (multilib; first launch may download)

items.name: Lutris
items.desc: Open gaming platform for Wine/Proton titles

items.name: Wine
items.desc: Windows compatibility layer for games and apps

items.name: Omarchy utility keys
items.desc: Share, transcode, OCR, night light (Super+Ctrl+…)

items.name: Secondary drive automount
items.desc: Premount non-system disks under /mnt/<label> at boot

items.name: Tailscale connect
items.desc: Preinstalled mesh VPN — enable daemon and connect
items.install: sudo systemctl enable --now tailscaled; echo 'Connect with: sudo tailscale up'; echo 'Optional: sudo tailscale up --ssh for Tailscale SSH'

items.name: VLC
items.desc: Media player for local files and streams

items.name: Spotify
items.desc: Music streaming client

items.name: OBS Studio
items.desc: Screen recording and streaming (+ hardware encoders)

items.name: Obsidian
items.desc: Knowledge base and Markdown notes

items.name: Once
items.desc: Basecamp self-hosted web app manager (installs + starts Docker)
items.install: sudo pacman -S --needed --noconfirm once-bin docker; sudo systemctl enable --now docker.service; sudo usermod -aG docker "$USER"; echo 'Once + Docker installed. Log out and back in (or: newgrp docker) for docker group.'

items.name: Dropbox
items.desc: Cloud file sync and sharing
items.install: sudo pacman -S --needed --noconfirm dropbox dropbox-cli nautilus-dropbox; systemctl --user enable --now dropbox 2>/dev/null || true; echo 'Dropbox installed — link your account on first start.'

items.name: Pinta
items.desc: Simple image editor (Paint.NET-style)

items.name: Kdenlive
items.desc: Video editor (hardware-accelerated export)

items.name: Claude Code
items.desc: Anthropic terminal coding agent

items.name: Codex CLI
items.desc: OpenAI terminal coding agent

items.name: opencode
items.desc: Open-source terminal coding agent

items.name: Ollama
items.desc: Run LLMs locally (GPU-accelerated)
items.install: gpu=$(lspci -nn 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'VGA|3D|Display'); if echo "$gpu" | grep -qi '10de'; then pkg=ollama-cuda; elif echo "$gpu" | grep -qi '1002'; then pkg=ollama-rocm; else pkg=ollama; fi; echo "Installing $pkg"; sudo pacman -S --needed --noconfirm "$pkg"

items.name: LM Studio
items.desc: Desktop app to run LLMs locally (GPU-accelerated)

items.name: Pi Coding Agent
items.desc: Interactive AI coding agent (multi-provider)
